results.pageTitle: Shunning deep-rooted caste biases in Tamil Nadu’s equality villages| India News

extractedData.headline: Shunning deep-rooted caste biases in Tamil Nadu’s equality villages| India News
extractedData.summary: In 1997, then chief minister M Karunanidhi introduced the concept of Samathuvupuram — a village where the government would provide free housing to people from different castes who would live together and shared civic amenities.| India News

extractedData.headline: As India Bans Disposable Plastic, Tamil Nadu Offers Lessons - The New York Times
extractedData.summary: Tamil Nadu’s ban on single-use plastic has gotten results, thanks to relentless policing. Now, India says it will tackle the problem nationwide.
